scope: custom: core_engine + combat — Module 5 (stance + reaction + coherence)
note: The three sigma-space matchup modifiers (combat_v32_proposal §7.1/§7.2/§7.3 + §6.11). ALL Class B draft sim-seeds — the matchup tables the I-17 balance pass exists to tune (Stance Counter cell values, Reaction baseline/slope coefficients, named-set bonus levels, antagonism penalty). Reuses M1 LEVEL_SIGMA for all level->delta-sigma conversion. FLAGGED for Jordan: these are the prep-doc draft magnitudes (Phase 11 stance tuning to Fast-vs-Titan 50-60%; Phase 14 coherence; reaction params sim-tunable I-17) — NOT canonical, NOT pre-decided.

entries.quoted_text: Per-stance × per-stance σ-space modifier, state-gated to Closing. Anti-symmetric ([A][B]=−[B][A]); diagonal 0. Kept authored (≈85% cyclic, only 19/25 reproduced by low-D). Magnitudes draft; Phase 11 tunes to Fast-vs-Titan 50–60%.
values are legacy Ob magnitudes mapped to σ-space levels: ±1 → Moderate 0.5δσ; ±2 → Strong 0.75δσ; sign negative = Aggressor advantaged
Reaction δσ = baseline_r + slope_r·(depth−3). slope<0 punishes hesitation; slope>0 punishes overcommitment. Exact parameters draft; sim-tunable I-17.
Coherent loadouts recognized as named sets granting a σ-space set bonus (state-gated). Set-bonus magnitudes draft; sim-tunable Phase 14.
full set = stated bonus; near-set (exactly one core missing) = one level lower (Strong→Moderate→Minor→none); fewer = nothing (N4 cliff smoothing)
Two pairings do not fold into the set structure: −Moderate (δσ −0.5) when both co-fire on a sub-action. No general 36-pair matrix is retained.
